## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->


## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / component
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/CD / infrastructure
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated for all new/changed code
- [ ] All CI checks pass locally (`make ci`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs/, docstrings)
- [ ] If adding a new component: implements the relevant ABC and has a factory entry
- [ ] If adding a config option: added to `config.py`, `.env.example`, and `docs/configuration.md`
- [ ] If changing API: updated `docs/api/rest.md`
- [ ] If guideline-driven: references the relevant guideline section (e.g., "Implements §3.1")
- [ ] No new secrets or API keys in code
- [ ] `make lint format typecheck` pass
